scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server && rm -rf public && cp -r client/dist public
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.demo:ignite: npm run db:reset && npm start --prefix server
scripts.start:nova: npm start --prefix server & npm run dev --prefix client
scripts.nova-vault-backup: cp server/nova.db server/nova.db.bak && echo '>>> NOVA_VAULT: Immutable Snapshot Created.'
scripts.nova-vault-restore: cp server/nova.db.bak server/nova.db && echo '>>> NOVA_VAULT: Perfect State Restored.'
